---
title: Chapter 2
format: html
theme: cosmo
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["--bs-primary:.*#2780e3"]
        - ["#2c3e50", "#375a7f"]
---

## Chapter 2

This document sets `theme: cosmo` in frontmatter, overriding both the
directory-level flatly and the project-level darkly.
